nodes.name: Query Renewal Candidates
nodes.notes: Calls a Supabase RPC/View that joins certifications + profiles + cert_schedules + approved CEU progress + notification_preferences. See CERT-DUE-DATES-ENGINE.md for the SQL. Each returned row should include: member_id, email, first_name, cert_type, expiration_date, renewal_cycle_months, ceu_total_required, ceu_total_approved, renewal_reminders (bool).

nodes.name: Split Out Rows
nodes.notes: If the RPC returns a bare array, set 'Field to Split Out' to the array path. Adjust to '' / item if the HTTP node already returns one item per row.

nodes.name: Opted Into Alerts
nodes.notes: notification_preferences.renewal_reminders is the alert-preference column (SCHEMA-CURRENT.md). Members are alerted unless they have explicitly turned it off (!== false).

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: $env.RESEND_FROM_EMAIL || 'noreply@abcac.org', to: $json.email, subject: 'Your ' + $json.cert_type + ' renews in ' + $json.daysUntilDue + ' days', html: '

Hi ' + ($json.first_name || 'there') + ',

Your ' + $json.cert_type + ' certification expires on ' + $json.expiration_date + ' — ' + $json.daysUntilDue + ' days from now. You have ' + $json.ceuRemaining + ' CEU hours remaining for this renewal cycle.

Start your renewal

' }) }}

nodes.name: Send Renewal Email
nodes.notes: Resend transactional email. Swap for the n8n SMTP / 'Send Email' node if you prefer SMTP. RESEND_API_KEY / RESEND_FROM_EMAIL / PORTAL_URL are env-based placeholders — no secrets in this file.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: $env.RESEND_FROM_EMAIL || 'noreply@abcac.org', to: $env.ALERT_OPS_EMAIL || 'ops@abcac.org', subject: 'ABCAC-01-RENEWAL-ALERTS failed', html: '

The renewal-alerts workflow failed.

Workflow: ' + ($json.workflow ? $json.workflow.name : 'ABCAC-01-RENEWAL-ALERTS') + '

Error: ' + ($json.execution && $json.execution.error ? $json.execution.error.message : 'see n8n execution log') + '

' }) }}

nodes.name: Notify Ops Of Failure
nodes.notes: Routes any execution failure to the ops inbox (ALERT_OPS_EMAIL env).
